description: In this episode of Binance VIP Voices, host Michaela introduces Stef Wynendaele from Keyrock, discussing the role of market makers in the crypto space. They explore market making, liquidity provision, and the differences between crypto and traditional finance [t=0:24].
topic_summary: The discussion focuses on market making, its significance in providing liquidity, and the unique challenges faced in the crypto market compared to traditional finance [t=225:94].
